languages.text: "Закономерный вопрос, Вольный Торговец, и думаю, ответ вас вполне удовлетворит. После того, как воссоздание Триасоматы {nc|не подтвердило моей гипотезы|завершилось неудачей}, я потратил изрядно времени, чтобы сделать из этого выводы. Плодом моих трудов стала формула бионической синергии, кратно увеличивающая эффективность слияния аугментики с носителем".

"A reasonable question, Rogue Trader, and I believe the answer will prove most satisfactory. After the Triasomata reconstruction {nc|failed to confirm my hypothesis|ended in failure}, I spent considerable time drawing conclusions from it. The fruit of my labours is a formula for bionic synergy that enhances the efficiency of augmetic integration with the host."
languages.original_text: "Закономерный вопрос, Вольный Торговец, и думаю, ответ вас вполне удовлетворит. После того, как воссоздание Триасоматы {nc|не подтвердило моей гипотезы|завершилось неудачей}, я потратил изрядно времени, чтобы сделать из этого выводы. Плодом моих трудов стала формула бионической синергии, кратно увеличивающая эффективность слияния аугментики с носителем".

After the Triasomata reconstruction {nc|failed to confirm my hypothesis|ended in failure}, I spent considerable time drawing conclusions from it. The fruit of my labours is a formula for bionic synergy that multiplies the efficiency of augmentic integration with the host."

languages.text: "Eine vernünftige Frage, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, und ich denke, die Antwort wird sich als zufriedenstellend erweisen. Nachdem die Rekonstruktion des Triasomata {nc|meine Hypothese nicht bestätigte|fehlschlug}, habe ich beträchtlich Zeit investiert, um Schlüsse daraus zu ziehen. Die Frucht meiner Arbeit ist eine Formel für eine bionische Synergie zur Erhöhung der Effizienz augmetischer Erweiterungen des Wirtes."
languages.original_text: "A reasonable question, Rogue Trader, and I believe the answer will prove most satisfactory. After the Triasomata reconstruction {nc|failed to confirm my hypothesis|ended in failure}, I spent considerable time drawing conclusions from it. The fruit of my labours is a formula for bionic synergy that enhances the efficiency of augmetic integration with the host."

traits.locale_text: "Eine vernünftige Frage, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, und ich denke, die Antwort wird sich als zufriedenstellend erweisen. Nachdem die Rekonstruktion des Triasomata {nc|meine Hypothese nicht bestätigte|fehlschlug}, habe ich beträchtlich Zeit investiert, um Schlüsse daraus zu ziehen. Die Frucht meiner Arbeit ist eine Formel für eine bionische Synergie zur Erhöhung der Effizienz augmetischer Erweiterungen des Wirtes."

languages.text: « Votre question est tout à fait légitime, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, et je pense que la réponse vous donnera entière satisfaction. Quand la reconstruction du Triasomata {nc|n'a pas confirmé mon hypothèse|s'est soldée par un échec}, j'ai pris le temps d'en tirer toutes les conclusions possibles. Le fruit de mes travaux est une formule de synergie bionique qui améliore l'efficacité de l'intégration des implants chez l'hôte. »
languages.original_text: "A reasonable question, Rogue Trader, and I believe the answer will prove most satisfactory. After the Triasomata reconstruction {nc|failed to confirm my hypothesis|ended in failure}, I spent considerable time drawing conclusions from it. The fruit of my labours is a formula for bionic synergy that enhances the efficiency of augmetic integration with the host."

traits.locale_text: « Votre question est tout à fait légitime, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, et je pense que la réponse vous donnera entière satisfaction. Quand la reconstruction du Triasomata {nc|n'a pas confirmé mon hypothèse|s'est soldée par un échec}, j'ai pris le temps d'en tirer toutes les conclusions possibles. Le fruit de mes travaux est une formule de synergie bionique qui améliore l'efficacité de l'intégration des implants chez l'hôte. »

languages.text: “问得好，行商浪人，我相信这答案会令您非常满意。三相体的重构{nc|未能证实我的猜测|失败}后，我花费了大量时间从中得出结论。而我劳动的成果即为一套生物力学协同公式，能够提高植入物与宿主融合的效率。”
languages.original_text: "A reasonable question, Rogue Trader, and I believe the answer will prove most satisfactory. After the Triasomata reconstruction {nc|failed to confirm my hypothesis|ended in failure}, I spent considerable time drawing conclusions from it. The fruit of my labours is a formula for bionic synergy that enhances the efficiency of augmetic integration with the host."

traits.locale_text: “问得好，行商浪人，我相信这答案会令您非常满意。三相体的重构{nc|未能证实我的猜测|失败}后，我花费了大量时间从中得出结论。而我劳动的成果即为一套生物力学协同公式，能够提高植入物与宿主融合的效率。”

languages.text: «Es una pregunta razonable, Comerciante Independiente, y creo que la respuesta le resultará satisfactoria. Cuando la reconstrucción del triasómata {nc|no confirmó mi hipótesis|terminó fracasando}, pasé un tiempo considerable extrayendo conclusiones. El fruto de mi labor es una fórmula de sinergia biónica que amplifica la eficacia de la integración de los auméticos con el anfitrión».
languages.original_text: "A reasonable question, Rogue Trader, and I believe the answer will prove most satisfactory. After the Triasomata reconstruction {nc|failed to confirm my hypothesis|ended in failure}, I spent considerable time drawing conclusions from it. The fruit of my labours is a formula for bionic synergy that enhances the efficiency of augmetic integration with the host."

traits.locale_text: «Es una pregunta razonable, Comerciante Independiente, y creo que la respuesta le resultará satisfactoria. Cuando la reconstrucción del triasómata {nc|no confirmó mi hipótesis|terminó fracasando}, pasé un tiempo considerable extrayendo conclusiones. El fruto de mi labor es una fórmula de sinergia biónica que amplifica la eficacia de la integración de los auméticos con el anfitrión».

languages.text: 「もっともな質問だ、ローグ・トレーダー。その答えは、きっと大いに満足のいくものになるだろう。トリアソマタ再構成が{nc|私の仮説を裏づけられずに終わった|失敗に終わった}のち、私はそこから結論を導き出すのに相当な時間を費やした。その労苦の結晶が、宿主とのオーグメティック統合の効率を高める、バイオニック・シナジーの公式なのだ。」
languages.original_text: "A reasonable question, Rogue Trader, and I believe the answer will prove most satisfactory. After the Triasomata reconstruction {nc|failed to confirm my hypothesis|ended in failure}, I spent considerable time drawing conclusions from it. The fruit of my labours is a formula for bionic synergy that enhances the efficiency of augmetic integration with the host."

traits.locale_text: 「もっともな質問だ、ローグ・トレーダー。その答えは、きっと大いに満足のいくものになるだろう。トリアソマタ再構成が{nc|私の仮説を裏づけられずに終わった|失敗に終わった}のち、私はそこから結論を導き出すのに相当な時間を費やした。その労苦の結晶が、宿主とのオーグメティック統合の効率を高める、バイオニック・シナジーの公式なのだ。」

languages.text: "Makul bir soru Hür Tacir, cevabımın son derece tatmin edici olacağına inanıyorum. Üçyeköz'ün yeniden inşasının {nc|hipotezimi doğrulayamamasının|başarısızlıkla sonuçlanmasının} ardından bu durumdan sonuçlar çıkarmak için epey zaman harcadım. Çabalarımın meyvesi, ogmetiğin ev sahibi ile entegrasyonunun verimliliğini artıran biyonik bir sinerji formülüdür."
languages.original_text: "A reasonable question, Rogue Trader, and I believe the answer will prove most satisfactory. After the Triasomata reconstruction {nc|failed to confirm my hypothesis|ended in failure}, I spent considerable time drawing conclusions from it. The fruit of my labours is a formula for bionic synergy that enhances the efficiency of augmetic integration with the host."
